model_information.display_name: Nusinersen Mechanistic PK Model for Non-Human Primates
model_information.description: Mechanistic population PK model for nusinersen with CNS distribution in non-human primates. Nine-compartment model including cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), plasma, spinal cord regions (cervical, lumbar, thoracic), brain, deep brain tissue, pons, and peripheral compartment. Model captures drug distribution across blood-brain barrier and into CNS tissues.
model_information.author: UF
model_information.output: CONC_CSF, CONC_PLASMA, CONC_CERV, CONC_BRAIN, CONC_LUM, CONC_THO, CONC_PONS
model_information.output_label: Cerebrospinal fluid (ug/mL), Plasma concentration (ug/mL), Cervical spinal cord (ug/g), Brain (ug/g), Lumbar spinal cord (ug/g), Thoracic spinal cord (ug/g), Pons (ug/g)
model_information.applications: CNS drug distribution prediction, dose optimization, intrathecal administration strategy evaluation, population PK analysis
